isolation.mode: read-only validation (navigation + inspection + screenshots + computed-style audits)

assertions.title: Run transcript terminal style

steps.expected: Runs transcript is visible with mixed reasoning/tool-call/error lines for style checks
steps.observed: Transcript loaded with mixed content lines (reasoning paragraphs, $-prefixed tool-call entries, and error text sample).

steps.action: Probe computed style for one reasoning sample, one $ tool-call sample, and one error sample and map to tokens
steps.expected: Reasoning maps to --fg-muted, tool-call maps to --warn, error maps to --dead
steps.observed: Root tokens: --fg-muted=rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68), --warn=#E8D560 (rgb(232, 213, 96)), --dead=#FF6060 (rgb(255, 96, 96)). Probes: reasoning sample "Paperclip workflow docs are loaded..." color=rgb(255, 255, 255), font-size=16px; tool-call sample "$ Executed 3 commands" color=rgb(255, 255, 255), font-size=16px; error sample "Cannot assign work to pending approval agents" color=rgb(255, 255, 255), font-size=15px. None matched expected tokens.

steps.expected: No blocking console errors and API network activity captured
steps.observed: Console export contained no entries; network capture includes API traffic (e.g., /api/health, /api/agents/ceo, /api/heartbeat-runs/*, /api/companies/{companyId}/live-runs, /api/companies/{companyId}/sidebar-badges).

assertions.issues: Transcript sample line colors still resolve to plain white instead of required muted/warn/dead token mapping.

assertions.title: Brutalist properties panel

steps.expected: Issue detail page loads with properties panel visible for key/value style audit
steps.observed: Issue detail loaded and properties panel controls were visible (Status, Priority, Labels, Assignee, Project).

steps.action: Probe key/value computed styles in properties panel, including interactive value controls
steps.expected: Keys: --fg-dim at 10px; values: --fg at 10px; no rounded dropdown controls
steps.observed: Keys for Status/Priority/Labels/Assignee/Project are all 10px and map to --fg-dim (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4)); controls map to --fg (rgb(255, 255, 255)) with border-radius 0px, but each interactive value control is 11px: Blocked=11px, Medium=11px, No labels=11px, CECEO=11px, Onboarding=11px.

steps.expected: No blocking console errors and issue-detail network requests captured
steps.observed: Console export contained no entries; network capture includes issue-detail API requests (/api/issues/WEA-1, /api/issues/WEA-1/comments, /api/issues/WEA-1/activity, /api/issues/WEA-1/runs, /api/issues/WEA-1/live-runs, /api/issues/WEA-1/active-run).

assertions.issues: Interactive value controls remain 11px instead of required 10px.

frictions.description: agent-browser errors export writes an empty file when there are no console errors.
frictions.resolution: Recorded as explicit "none" and kept the empty exported files as evidence.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 2 failed (VAL-GUI-AGDET-003 and VAL-GUI-ISSDET-003).
